message:
feat(replay): severity taxonomy and risk scoring for divergences (ft-og6q6.5.3)

Adds DivergenceSeverity (Info/Low/Medium/High/Critical), RiskScorer with
rule-id heuristics and custom TOML overrides, AggregateRisk with
Pass/Review/Block recommendation. 28 unit + 18 proptest = 46 tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
